Interface IWavelengthScheme

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

Provides access to members that specify the wavelength scheme.

[Guid("F6C08AAF-0365-4539-BE93-23C29488CF01")]

public interface IWavelengthScheme
